action.reasoning:
Observation: 5 epochs full data with CLIP ViT-B/16 → 21.17% on Quickdraw, source val_acc 82.52%. Significant improvement over published baseline (~17%). Time used: ~17min for that run, eval ~12min. Remaining: 9.7h, 18 iter.

Analysis: Source val_acc still rising. Could push more epochs but diminishing returns. Stronger sketch-bias augmentation (higher SketchifyAug prob) might help further close gap. Quickdraw is pure black-on-white line drawings, so converting more sources to edge-maps during training should help. Let me also push more epochs and reduce ColorJitter (since target has no color info).

Decision: Train for 8 more epochs (continuing or fresh) with much stronger sketch augmentations: SketchifyAug p=0.5, RandomGrayscale p=0.5, no color jitter. Resume from best.pt to save time. Actually let me train fresh because aug schedule is different and we want a clean training. ~134s/epoch × 8 = ~18min. Submit eval after.
